invalid_land_size: Please enter a valid land size
login_failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
new_user_hint: You will be directed to complete your profile if you are a new user
register_plan_hint: Share your plan to help avoid future market surplus
no_notes: No notes available for this crop
no_plans: You don't have any planting plans yet.
confirm_cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this plan?
confirm_harvest: Are you sure you want to mark this plan as harvested?
harvest_not_ready: Harvesting is allowed only within 14 days of the expected harvest date.
plant_crop_desc: Time to plant {crop} according to your plan.
predictions_desc: Advanced AI models to predict market trends and crop yields.
assistant_desc: Smart agricultural advisor trained on your farm data and local market trends.
crop_yield_prediction: Predicting actual crop yields based on historical data and weather patterns.
voice_mode_desc: Talk to your assistant naturally using speech-to-text and text-to-speech technologies.
image_analysis_desc: Upload crop images to detect diseases and get treatment advice.
delete_task_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
harvest_date_after_planting: Harvest date must be after planting date
sale_date_after_planting: Sale date must be after planting date
prediction_error: Failed to get prediction. Please try again.
profit_prediction_desc: The system predicts the expected profit for each crop or agricultural scenario based on planting, production, and market data. This feature helps the farmer evaluate financial feasibility before planting or selling, thus making more accurate and profitable decisions.
yield_prediction_desc: The system predicts the actual expected production of the crop based on agricultural and environmental data such as area, water, fertilizers, weather, and crop type. This feature helps in production planning and estimating outputs before the harvest season.
price_prediction_desc: The system predicts the expected market price of the crop based on historical data and current market conditions such as supply, demand, location, and time. This feature helps the farmer make a better decision regarding the timing of sale or storage.
demand_prediction_desc: The system classifies the level of demand for the crop into three categories: low, medium, or high, depending on market data, supply and demand, and some temporal factors. This feature helps in providing better recommendations about suitable crops for planting or sale.
allocation_prediction_desc: This feature helps the farmer distribute their land among crops in a better way to achieve higher profit. The system relies on data such as land area, location, water, and fertilizers, then suggests how much to plant of each crop. It also ensures the plan is balanced, so the farmer does not rely heavily on one crop only, thereby helping them increase profit in a practical and safe way.
profit_model_detail: The system predicts the expected profit for each crop or agricultural scenario based on planting, production, and market data. This feature helps the farmer evaluate financial feasibility before planting or selling, thus making more accurate and profitable decisions.

pest_indicator_desc: Check if you have noticed any pests in your farm
request_service_desc: Help us improve and develop our digital services list
suggest_desc: Tell us more about your idea...
share_message: Try Hasaad app to help farmers plan and make better decisions 🌱 Download now: https://hasaad.app
smart_assistant_desc: The system includes advanced AI capable of making decisions and suggesting full planting plans based on available data such as crop performance, weather conditions, resource usage, and market dynamics. The system constantly analyzes dataset features like profit, demand level, supply level, and efficiency metrics to generate smart recommendations and improve decision-making over time.
msg_tomato: Plant tomatoes next week for better yield.
msg_cucumber: Reduce cucumber planting due to low demand.
irrigation_desc: Optimize water usage based on crop type, weather, and efficiency.
voice_assistant_desc: Ask questions about your farm, crops, and performance using voice.
no_plans_financial_hint: You must add a planting plan first to be able to record financial data for your crops.
plots_explanation_desc: This section helps you understand the current state of the market, including trends, crop performance, and resource usage through visual data analysis.
demand_subtitle: Comparing the relative demand levels across different crop types.
selling_subtitle: Distribution of the top performing crops by sales volume.
resource_subtitle: Overview of water and fertilizer consumption in your farm.
sales_subtitle: Monitoring your revenue growth and patterns over time.
profit_subtitle: Visualizing the balance between your earnings and operational costs.
no_data_chart: No data available for this chart.
refresh_hint: Added a plan and it isn't showing? Tap here to refresh.
onboarding_desc_1: Join a collective planting plan to stabilize the market. Hasaad helps you know what to plant and when to avoid market surplus.
onboarding_desc_2: Predict prices, yields, and demand with advanced AI. Get personalized advice based on real-time market data.
onboarding_desc_3: Manage your tasks, track financials, find workers, and monitor your farm's performance in one place.
